name: Baked Apple Pancake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt into a bowl.
In another bowl, beat the egg whites until foamy. Gradually add 3 tablespoons of sugar,
beating until stiff peaks form. Beat the egg yolks in a separate bowl until pale yellow.
Alternately add milk and flour mixture to egg yolks, folding in the egg whites.
Stir together the remaining cinnamon and 2 tablespoons of sugar for dusting.
Melt butter in an oven-safe skillet. Pour the batter into the skillet.
Sprinkle with the cinnamon-sugar mixture. Bake for 10-15 minutes.
Cut into wedges and dust with confectioner's sugar before serving.
